details.effect: [evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. This card can't be destroyed by abilities or take ability damage. [fanfare] [cost05]: Search your deck for a Treacherous Reversal, put it into your EX area, then shuffle. It costs 8 less to play this turn.

name: XII. Wolfraud, The Hanged Man Evolved

details.effect: This card can't be destroyed by abilities or take ability damage. On Evolve, Combo (3) - Give this follower [attack]+1/[defense]+1.

[fanfare] Summon an Ancient Artifact or Mystic Artifact token. Put the other into your EX area. [act] [engage], banish 5 cards with different base costs from your EX area: You may summon a Spinaria & Lucille, Keepers from your evolve deck.

[fanfare] Deal 6 damage to each enemy leader and enemy follower on the field. Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. You may put up to 2 of them into your EX area. Bury the rest. Whenever an enemy follower is put onto the field, [engage]: Deal it 6 damage. At the start of your end phase, refresh this card.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. Whenever a Mercenary follower is put onto your field, give it [attack]+1/[defense]+1 and Rush.

On Evolve - Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may put a follower that costs 2 or less from among them into your EX area. It costs 2 less to play this turn. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order. Whenever a Mercenary follower is put onto your field, give it [attack]+1/[defense]+1 and Rush.
Ward. [fanfare] Return a Beast follower not named Windflower Tiger on your field to its owner's hand: Search your deck for a Salvia Panther, reveal it, add it to your hand, then shuffle.

Destroy each card on the field. Each player buries each card in their EX area. Discard your hand. Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. You may put any number of them into your EX area. Bury the rest.
This card costs 2 less to play if a Beast follower not named Salvia Panther was returned to hand from your field this turn. ---------- [evolve] [cost02]: Evolve this follower. Storm.
Storm. On Evolve - Select an enemy follower that costs 3 or less on the field and return it to its owner's hand.

[fanfare] Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may put one of them into your EX area. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order. [act] [engage]: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it damage equal to the number of cards with different base costs in your EX area.
Rush. [fanfare] Combo (3) - Search your deck for a Lumbering Carapace, reveal it, add it to your hand, then shuffle.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Search your deck for an Arcana card, put it into your EX area, then shuffle.
On Evolve - Search your deck for an Arcana card, put it into your EX area, then shuffle.
[fanfare] [cost05]: Select an enemy follower on the field. Put it on the bottom of its owner's deck and draw a card. When this card is returned to hand from your field, give your leader [defense]+1.
[fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and, if there are at least 3 cards with different base costs in your EX area, deal it 3 damage.

Storm. Whenever another Beast follower is put onto your field, give this follower [attack]+2/[defense]+2. [act] [cost01], put this card from your hand into your EX area: Select a card on your field and put it into its owner's EX area.
Summon 2 Fairy tokens. Deal each enemy leader damage equal to the number of Pixie tokens on your field.

[fanfare] Choose one. (1) Summon a Knight token. (2) Give this follower [attack]+1, Rush, and Ward. (3) Deal 2 damage to each enemy leader. (4) [cost04], bury this card: You may summon a VII. Oluon, Runaway Chariot from your evolve deck.

This follower can't attack enemies. At the start of your end phase, do the following 2 times. Roll a 6-sided die. If you roll a 1 or 2, destroy each enemy follower on the field. If you roll a 3 or 4, deal 7 damage to each enemy leader. If you roll a 5 or 6, deal 7 damage to your leader.
[evolve] [cost02]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Search your deck for an Ilmisuna, Discord Hawker, summon it, then shuffle.
On Evolve - Search your deck for an Ernesta, Weapons Hawker, summon it, then shuffle. Put an Exterminus Weapon token into your EX area.

[act] [engage]: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage. If there's a Merchant follower not named Ilmisuna, Discord Hawker on your field, deal 5 damage instead.

[fanfare] Summon 2 Shield Guardian tokens. [fanfare] [cost03]: Give each follower with Ward on your field [attack]+1/[defense]+2.

[fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field. Destroy it, discard your hand, then draw 3 cards.

[fanfare] Select another [swordcraft] follower on your field. Give it [attack]+1 and Assail. At the start of your end phase, if there's a Merchant follower not named Ernesta, Weapons Hawker on your field, deal 2 damage to each enemy leader.
